0:4.name: FortreeCity
0:4.extraction_notes: Nothing UNPARSED. No trainerbattle or giveitem in this map's scripts.inc. Kecleon object event is a hidden encounter (MOVEMENT_TYPE_INVISIBLE, FLAG_HIDE_FORTREE_CITY_KECLEON), not a person. FortreeCity_OnResume sets STEP_CB_FORTREE_BRIDGE (map script, not an object event). Sign bg_events (city sign, gym sign) exist but are bg_events, not object events.

0:5.name: LilycoveCity
0:5.extraction_notes: BerryGentleman (0:5:16) giveitem is dynamic: random 10 + FIRST_BERRY_INDEX, no fixed ITEM_ constant (flagged, not fabricated). Rival (0:5:17) graphics OBJ_EVENT_GFX_VAR_0 resolved at runtime by Common_EventScript_SetupRivalGfxId; 6 trainerbattle variants by gender x starter, all parties TrainerMonNoItemDefaultMoves, trainerbattle_no_intro. WailmerTrainerGrunt (0:5:10) despite name has NO trainerbattle - dialogue only. Item ball (0:5:11) uses finditem macro from item_ball_scripts.inc. LOCALID_LILYCOVE_WOMAN_1/MAN_1 are build-time generated from array position (19, 20). No coord_events on this map. Nothing UNPARSED except the dynamic berry item.

0:25.name: Route110
0:25.extraction_notes: All 36 object events parsed cleanly, none UNPARSED. Trainer battle text lives in shared data/text/trainers.h keyed by the same Route110_Text_* names, not in the map's scripts.inc. Rematchable trainers (Abigail, Benjamin, Edwin, Isabel) use trainerbattle_rematch on their _1 constant; escalated parties (_2.._5) are resolved by the engine's runtime rematch table, recorded as notes, not guessed. sParty_Jacob slot 3 has .iv = 200 verbatim in trainer_parties.h (unusual but recorded as-is). Rival (28/29) and Birch (36) have script 0x0, driven by coord_event scene triggers. Berry trees x3 share the generic BerryTreeScript. Rival battle reward giveitem ITEM_ITEMFINDER is in the scene script, not an object's own script.

0:1.name: SlateportCity
0:1.extraction_notes: No trainerbattle anywhere on this map (grep-confirmed) - all Team Aqua grunts are dialogue-only. Scott (0:1:35) has script 0x0, dialogue lives in map-level OnFrame + coord_event scenes (flagged UNPARSED as per-object script). EffortRibbonWoman awards ribbon via special GiveLeadMonEffortRibbon, not giveitem. BerryPowderClerk's exchange uses dynamic VAR_0x8008 item (11 possibilities). Mart-clerk globals (gText_HowMayIServeYou etc.) defined in data/text/mart_clerk.inc / data/event_scripts.s, external to map. Local ids without explicit local_id field are array-position implicit per engine convention.

9:11.name: SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F
9:11.extraction_notes: Nothing UNPARSED. Nurse (local 1, LOCALID_SLATEPORT_NURSE) delegates to shared Common_EventScript_PkmnCenterNurse in data/scripts/pkmn_center_nurse.inc; all branches traced (gold card via CountPlayerTrainerStars==4 + FLAG_NURSE_MENTIONS_GOLD_CARD, pokerus via FLAG_POKERUS_EXPLAINED + IsPokerusInParty, union room reminder via FLAG_NURSE_UNION_ROOM_REMINDER). Specials (CountPlayerTrainerStars etc.) are engine code, recorded as-is. No trainerbattle/giveitem anywhere in this map's script tree. Sailor and Woman are simple unconditional MSGBOX_NPC.

dialogue.text: No one believes me, but I saw this gigantic POKéMON in the sky. It seemed to squirm as it flew toward ROUTE 131. By the way… Sniff… Um… You, uh…smell singed. Were you at a volcano or something?
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_SawGiganticPokemonInSky

dialogue.text: The ground absorbs rainwater, and trees grow by drinking that water… Our FORTREE CITY exists because there's both water and soil.
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_TreesGrowByDrinkingRainwater

dialogue.text: I want to go to the POKéMON GYM, but something's blocking the way. After all the bother I went through training on ROUTE 120…
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_SomethingBlockingGym

dialogue.text: I've got my pride-and-joy POKéMON with me. This time, I'll beat WINONA.
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_ThisTimeIllBeatWinona

dialogue.text: Living on top of trees is okay. But sometimes BUG POKéMON come in through windows. It can be really startling.
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_BugPokemonComeThroughWindow

dialogue.text: The CITY consists of homes built on trees. Perhaps because of that lifestyle, everyone is healthy and lively. Why, even myself--I feel as if I've grown thirty years younger.
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_EveryoneHealthyAndLively

dialogue.text: There are POKéMON that evolve when you trade them! That's what I heard.
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_PokemonThatEvolveWhenTraded

0:4:7.object_type: object (Pokemon sprite, invisible passive encounter, not a person NPC)

dialogue.condition: checkitem ITEM_DEVON_SCOPE -> VAR_RESULT != TRUE (player lacks Devon Scope)
dialogue.text: Something unseeable is in the way.
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_SomethingUnseeable

dialogue.text: Something unseeable is in the way. Want to use the DEVON SCOPE?
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_UnseeableUseDevonScope

dialogue.condition: player answers YES at the above yes/no -> FortreeCity_EventScript_UseDevonScope; then setflag FLAG_KECLEON_FLED_FORTREE and removeobject
dialogue.text: {PLAYER} used the DEVON SCOPE. An invisible POKéMON became completely visible! The startled POKéMON fled!
dialogue.label: FortreeCity_Text_UsedDevonScopePokemonFled
LilycoveCity_Text_TeamAquaBeenTrainingWailmer
dialogue.text: TEAM AQUA's been training their WAILMER in the cove. We SAILORS can't get our boats out to sea with them in the way!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_SomeonePuntedTeamAquaOut
dialogue.text: Ahoy, did you know? Someone punted TEAM AQUA out of the way for us! That got the WAILMER out of the cove, so we can get our boats out again.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_StrangeCaveInCove
dialogue.text: Have you seen that strange cave in the cove at the edge of town?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_GoingToMoveDeleterForHMs
dialogue.text: I'm going to teach my POKéMON some new moves for entering a CONTEST. So, I'm going to see the MOVE DELETER and make it forget HM moves.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_ContestHallInTown
dialogue.text: There's a POKéMON CONTEST HALL right in this here town. That means well-raised POKéMON will come from all over the country. My heart swells with excitement!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_ImFromKanto
dialogue.text: I came from KANTO. The HOENN region is beautiful with all its water and verdant nature. Hunh? Wait a second… Could there be rare POKéMON that live only in this area?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_ImArtDealer
dialogue.text: I'm an ART DEALER. I am a buyer and seller of fine art, especially paintings. I've heard that the MUSEUM here has magnificent works on exhibit…

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_SomeoneStoleMyPokemon
dialogue.text: I was taking a relaxing snooze at the seaside inn to the sound of waves… When someone stole my POKéMON! Who's the abductor? TEAM AQUA? Is it TEAM AQUA?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_MissingPokemonCameBack
dialogue.text: My missing POKéMON… It came back without me noticing!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_SeaRemainsForeverYoung
dialogue.text: Even as we grow old and wrinkled, the sea remains forever young with the vivid brilliance of life… Fwohoho fwohohohoho…

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_SixtyYearsAgoHusbandProposed
dialogue.text: It was sixty years ago that my husband proposed to me here. The sea remains as beautiful as ever. Mufufufu mufufufufufu…

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_TeamAquaRenovatedCavern
dialogue.text: Hm, you know of the peculiar cavern in this cove? That had been a natural formation, but then that TEAM AQUA lot came along and made their renovations. They call themselves the “nature-loving TEAM AQUA”! But what they do and what they say don't match at all!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_TeamAquaLotGoneForGood
dialogue.text: That cave in the cove… I didn't notice it right away, but it's completely empty now. That TEAM AQUA lot, they must have gone away for good.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_WailmerLeapOutOfWater
dialogue.text: There! WAILMER! Leap out of the water now!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_GetLostMessingUpTraining
dialogue.text: Hunh? What do you want? You're messing up our training, so can you, like, get lost?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_WailmerLeapOutOfWater
dialogue.text: There! WAILMER! Leap out of the water now!

0:5:10.notes: Named 'TrainerGrunt' but has no trainerbattle command - dialogue only (confirmed by full script read).

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_IfWorldBecomesOurs
dialogue.text: If this whole wide world becomes ours, TEAM AQUA's, it will be a happier place for POKéMON, too.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_MovedLootIntoHideoutToday
dialogue.text: Fufufu… We moved more loot into our secret HIDEOUT today… Wh-who are you?! I was just talking to myself!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_ChanceToDoBigThings
dialogue.text: I'm just a GRUNT, so I don't know what the BOSS is thinking… But being on TEAM AQUA, I know I'll get the chance to do big things! Wh-who are you?! I was just talking to myself!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_DontGoNearCaveInCove
dialogue.text: Hey, you! Don't go near the cave in the cove! Why? You don't need a reason why! I'm an adult, so you just listen to me!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_BerrySuitsYou
dialogue.text: When it gets right down to it… The same way suits suit me perfectly, a crisp breeze suits the sea. And you, a BERRY suits you to a “T”… Why should that be so?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_BecauseYoureTrainer
dialogue.text: When it gets right down to it… It's because you're a TRAINER!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_PokeblocksSuitPokemon
dialogue.text: When it gets right down to it… The way dignified simplicity suits me, {POKEBLOCK}S perfectly suit POKéMON.

giveitem.note: UNPARSED exact item: resolved at runtime, not a fixed ITEM_ constant

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_MayShoppingLetsBattle
dialogue.text: MAY: Oh, hey? {PLAYER}{KUN}, are you shopping, too? I bought a whole bunch of DOLLS and POSTERS. Of course, I've also caught a lot of POKéMON, and I'm raising them properly, too. Actually, I'm more worried if you're raising POKéMON properly, {PLAYER}{KUN}. I'll battle with you, so you can show me your POKéMON, {PLAYER}{KUN}.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_MayBattleMe
dialogue.text: MAY: Come on, battle with me, so I can check out your POKéMON!

dialogue.condition: May branch, answer NO; sets FLAG_DECLINED_RIVAL_BATTLE_LILYCOVE
dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_MayNotRaisingPokemon
dialogue.text: MAY: Oh, why? {PLAYER}{KUN}, haven't you been raising your POKéMON? That's not a very good showing as a TRAINER…

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_MayWontBeBeaten
dialogue.text: MAY: The POKéMON I raised won't be beaten by your POKéMON, {PLAYER}{KUN}!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanShoppingLetsBattle
dialogue.text: BRENDAN: Oh, hey, it's {PLAYER}. I'm running an errand for my dad. No, I'm not buying any DOLLS. Anyways, it's been a while. Want to have a battle to see who's been raising POKéMON better?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanBattleMe
dialogue.text: BRENDAN: Want to battle to see who's been raising POKéMON better?

dialogue.condition: Brendan branch, answer NO; sets FLAG_DECLINED_RIVAL_BATTLE_LILYCOVE
dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanNoConfidence
dialogue.text: BRENDAN: Oh, what's the matter? Don't have the confidence?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanWontBeBeaten
dialogue.text: BRENDAN: Aww, but you know I'm not going to lose to no {PLAYER}.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_MayGoingBackToLittleroot
dialogue.text: MAY: I'm thinking of going back to LITTLEROOT soon. I've caught a decent group of POKéMON, and my POKéDEX is coming along, so I'm going home to show my dad.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_BrendanGoingBackToLittleroot
dialogue.text: BRENDAN: I… I plan on going home to LITTLEROOT. You know I'm helping out my dad on his POKéDEX. It's coming together pretty decently, so I should go show him.

trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: … … … … … … … … I remember the battle I had with you, {PLAYER}{KUN}, on ROUTE 103. That battle helped you become this strong, {PLAYER}{KUN}, didn't it?
… … … … … … … … I remember the battle I had with you, {PLAYER}{KUN}, on ROUTE 103. That battle helped you become this strong, {PLAYER}{KUN}, didn't it?
… … … … … … … … I remember the battle I had with you, {PLAYER}{KUN}, on ROUTE 103. That battle helped you become this strong, {PLAYER}{KUN}, didn't it?
Humph… You've done a lot of raising. That stings a bit--I had a head start on you as a TRAINER…
Humph… You've done a lot of raising. That stings a bit--I had a head start on you as a TRAINER…
Humph… You've done a lot of raising. That stings a bit--I had a head start on you as a TRAINER…

0:5:17.notes: Dynamic sprite via Common_EventScript_SetupRivalGfxId (OnTransition). trainerbattle_no_intro. Post-battle follow-up line varies with FLAG_BADGE06_GET/FLAG_BADGE08_GET/FLAG_SYS_GAME_CLEAR (collect badges / Pokemon League / Battle Frontier variants).

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_DoYouKnowAboutBerryBlender
dialogue.text: Do you know about the machine BERRY BLENDER?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_FasterSpinBetterPokeblocks
dialogue.text: People have to work together to get it to spin faster. The faster you can make it spin, the better {POKEBLOCK}S you can get, I've heard.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_ExplainBerryBlender
dialogue.text: It's used for making a kind of candy called a {POKEBLOCK}. If you give a good {POKEBLOCK} to a POKéMON, its condition will improve by a lot.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_HoneymoonVowToSeeRarePokemon
dialogue.text: On our honeymoon, we vowed to see as many rare POKéMON as we can. So we were delighted to see a rare POKéMON as soon as we arrived. I mean, we are totally happy!

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_JustArrivedAndSawRarePokemon
dialogue.text: We just arrived here on our honeymoon vacation. We happened to see a DRAGON-type POKéMON flying way up in the sky. Do cool POKéMON like that live in the HOENN region?

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_HeardTowerCalledSkyPillar
dialogue.text: I heard there's a tower somewhere out on the sea routes. It's called the SKY PILLAR, I hear.

dialogue.label: LilycoveCity_Text_SawTallTowerOnRoute131
dialogue.text: I saw this tall tower somewhere around ROUTE 131. Could that possibly be…?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_WhichShouldIChoose
dialogue.text: Which should I choose? Make a beeline for MAUVILLE on CYCLING ROAD, or take the low road and look for POKéMON?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BikeTechniques
dialogue.text: Learning techniques will make BIKE riding even more fun. There are some places that you can reach only by using a BIKE technique.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_WalkOnTheLowRoad
dialogue.text: I don't have a BIKE, so I'll take a leisurely walk on the low road.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_YouGotBikeFromRydel
dialogue.text: Oh, hey, you got that BIKE from RYDEL! Oh, it's glaringly obvious. It says right on your bike… RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL, RYDEL… That name's everywhere. You should ride it around all over the place--it's good advertising!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_TwoRoads
dialogue.text: The two roads, one above, one below… A road each for people and POKéMON. Perhaps that is right and fair.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_HairStreamsBehindMe
dialogue.text: How do you like the way my raven-colored hair streams behind me? I grew my hair out just for that.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_RideBikeAtFullSpeed
dialogue.text: Wouldn't it be great to ride a BIKE at full speed on CYCLING ROAD?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_JasminePostBattle
dialogue.text: Oh, you have some GYM BADGES? No wonder you're so strong!

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: I've been riding without stopping. My thighs are like rocks!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: I'm worried about muscle cramps…

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AnthonyPostBattle
dialogue.text: Speed alone won't let me win at POKéMON. I need to reconsider this…

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: Yo, you! Can you keep up with my speed?
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: Crash and burn!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AbigailPostBattle
dialogue.text: I'm exhausted, so I need a break. It's important to get proper rest.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AbigailRegister
dialogue.text: You know, I like you! Let's have a rematch on CYCLING ROAD.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AbigailRematchIntro
dialogue.text: Isn't it neat to hold a battle while cycling?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AbigailRematchDefeated
dialogue.text: Wow… How could you be so strong?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AbigailRematchPostBattle
dialogue.text: Were you going after a record? I'm sorry if I held you up!

trainerbattle.note: TRAINER_ABIGAIL_2 is the runtime rematch tier; script references _1 only
trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: The triathlon is hard in the extreme. You have to complete the three events of swimming, cycling, and running.
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: POKéMON battles are hard, too!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BenjaminPostBattle
dialogue.text: There's no need to panic or stress. Take it easy. There's plenty of time.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BenjaminRegister
dialogue.text: I'll keep chugging on without stressing. Give me a shout if you're up to it.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BenjaminRematchIntro
dialogue.text: Aren't you going a little too fast? Take it easy and let's battle.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BenjaminRematchDefeated
dialogue.text: I didn't panic, but I still lost…

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BenjaminRematchPostBattle
dialogue.text: There's no need to panic or stress. Take it easy. There's plenty of time.

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: Don't panic if your BIKE's going fast!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: I shouldn't panic during POKéMON battles…

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_EdwardPostBattle
dialogue.text: I see your future… Hmm… I see a shining light…

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: I have foreseen your intentions! I cannot possibly lose!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: I failed to prophesize my own demise!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_JaclynPostBattle
dialogue.text: You managed to win only because it was a wonder! Yes, a wonder! Don't think you can win all the time!

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: Ahahahaha! I'll dazzle you with my wonders!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: I wondrously lost!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_EdwinPostBattle
dialogue.text: When I see a POKéMON that I don't know, my passion as a collector is ignited!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_EdwinRegister
dialogue.text: I like collecting MATCH CALL registrations, too…

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_EdwinRematchIntro
dialogue.text: Hi, have you caught any new POKéMON? Could I see your POKéMON? Just one look, please?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_EdwinRematchDefeated
dialogue.text: Your POKéMON… I envy you.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_EdwinRematchPostBattle
dialogue.text: Oh, I long to make all rare POKéMON mine!

trainerbattle.note: TRAINER_EDWIN_2 is the runtime rematch tier
trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: Could I see your POKéMON? Just one look, please?
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: I wanted to complete my collection…

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_DalePostBattle
dialogue.text: Fishing is all about concentration. You have to focus on the floater.

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: Hey! Don't sneak up behind me like that!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: I lost! Drat!

0:25:16.notes: Generic engine berry-tree script, not map-specific dialogue.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AcroBikesDoNotQualify
dialogue.text: On this CYCLING ROAD, those riding MACH BIKES are rated for their number of collisions and their total times. ACRO BIKES do not qualify for rating. They are easy to turn, so it's not fair.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_RatedForNumberOfCollisions
dialogue.text: This is CYCLING ROAD. If you were to ride from MAUVILLE to SLATEPORT on a MACH BIKE, you would be rated for the number of collisions and your total time.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AlwaysAimHigher
dialogue.text: Regardless of the results, I count on seeing more challenges from you. Always aim higher!

0:25:21.notes: Also involved in coord_event Route110_EventScript_CyclingChallengeEnd (VAR_CYCLING_CHALLENGE_STATE==2) with rank-based Best/Good/Ok/Bad/Worst reactions via switch VAR_RESULT from FinishCyclingRoadChallenge.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_WeCantTalkAboutAquaActivities
dialogue.text: TEAM AQUA's activities… We can't talk about them yet.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_KickUpARuckus
dialogue.text: I want to get going to SLATEPORT and kick up a ruckus!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_MyFirstJobInAqua
dialogue.text: This is my first job after joining TEAM AQUA. It's a little scary.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AquaActionsBringSmiles
dialogue.text: TEAM AQUA's actions should bring smiles to people's faces!

0:25:26.notes: No script - decorative/background scene sprite only.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_JacobPostBattle
dialogue.text: Flat tires and brake problems can cause serious injury! Inspect your BIKE for problems!

trainerbattle.note: sParty_Jacob slot 3 .iv = 200 is verbatim from trainer_parties.h (the .iv field is a 0-255 'fixed IV' scalar in this struct, recorded as-is)
trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: Whoa! Watch it! I guess you're not used to BIKE racing.
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: Whoa! My brakes failed!

dialogue.condition: VAR_ROUTE110_STATE==0, coord trigger x=33/34/35,y=56 (May if player male / Brendan if female)
dialogue.label: Route110_Text_MayLetsBattle
dialogue.text: MAY: Hi, {PLAYER}{KUN}, long time no see! While I was searching for other POKéMON, my POKéMON grew stronger. So… How about a little battle?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BrendanLetsBattle
dialogue.text: BRENDAN: Hey, {PLAYER}. So this is where you were. How's it going? Have you been raising your POKéMON? I'll check for you.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_MayTakeThis
dialogue.text: MAY: {PLAYER}{KUN}, you've been busy training, too, haven't you? I think you deserve a reward! This is from me!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BrendanTakeThis
dialogue.text: BRENDAN: {PLAYER}, you've trained without me noticing… Good enough! Here, take this.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_MayExplainItemfinder
dialogue.text: MAY: That's an ITEMFINDER. Try it out. If there is an item that's not visible, it emits a sound. Okay, {PLAYER}{KUN}, let's meet again! I know it's a little silly coming from me, but I think you should train a lot harder for the next time.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_BrendanExplainItemfinder
dialogue.text: BRENDAN: That's an ITEMFINDER. Use it to root around for items that aren't visible. If it senses something, it emits a sound. Anyway, I'm off to look for new POKéMON.

trainerbattle.kind: trainerbattle_no_intro via coord_event scene (not object's own script)
trainerbattle.party_example: Brendan/Treecko: Wingull lvl18 iv50, Lombre lvl18 iv50, Combusken lvl20 iv100 (3-mon parties, chosen via switch VAR_STARTER_MON)

giveitem.via: Route110_EventScript_GiveItemfinder in the rival scene script

0:25:28.notes: Not directly interactable; driven by coord_event triggers.

0:25:29.notes: Swapped in for LOCALID_ROUTE110_RIVAL during rival scene exit movement; dynamic gfx via Common_EventScript_SetupRivalOnBikeGfxId.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_TimmyPostBattle
dialogue.text: It's hard to battle with POKéMON you just caught.

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: I found some cool POKéMON in the grass around here!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: Being cool isn't enough to win…

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_IsabelPostBattle
dialogue.text: Rather than battling, perhaps I should show off my POKéMON at the FAN CLUB.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_IsabelRegister
dialogue.text: That wasn't close to what I could do to show off my POKéMON. I'll have you as my captive audience as often as possible!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_IsabelRematchIntro
dialogue.text: Ahahahaha! I would be happy to show off my POKéMON as often as you like!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_IsabelRematchDefeated
dialogue.text: Oh, dear, this won't do.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_IsabelRematchPostBattle
dialogue.text: I don't think that I could ever stop from showing off my POKéMON. But I like to battle, too!

trainerbattle.note: TRAINER_ISABEL_2 is the runtime rematch tier
trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: Ahahaha! I would go anywhere to show off my delightful POKéMON.
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: Oh, dear, this won't do.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_KalebPostBattle
dialogue.text: Okay, okay, you've done the best you could, my pretties.

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: When cute POKéMON help each other… You won't see a more adorable sight!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: Have you no compassion or pity?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_AlyssaPostBattle
dialogue.text: Falling… Losing… This is so humiliating for me!

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: I fell off CYCLING ROAD… I'll get over my embarrassment by battling with you!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: Oops! I ended up losing!

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_JosephPostBattle
dialogue.text: This isn't going to bring me down! Losing has made me a better man!

trainerbattle.intro_text_resolved: Okay! Full-throttle time! If you can't groove, you get left behind!
trainerbattle.defeat_text_resolved: You got into the groove all right…

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_ImagineSeeingYouHere
dialogue.text: PROF. BIRCH: Oh, {PLAYER}{KUN}! Imagine seeing you here! And where might my {RIVAL} be?

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_HeardYouInstallMatchCall
dialogue.text: Oh, I see! You two are running separately. Well, that's fine. Oh, yes, I heard that your POKéNAV had the MATCH CALL system installed. Well, then, I should register you in my POKéNAV as well. That way, even when we're apart, I can rate your POKéDEX anytime. … … … … … …

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_RegisteredBirchInPokenav
dialogue.text: Registered PROF. BIRCH in the POKéNAV.

dialogue.label: Route110_Text_KeepAnEyeOutForRival
dialogue.text: PROF. BIRCH: {PLAYER}{KUN}… Please keep an eye out for my {RIVAL}. … … … … … … Well, I had better get going. See you again, {PLAYER}{KUN}!

0:25:36.notes: Not directly interactable; driven by coord_event triggers BirchScene1-4.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_AmIOnTV
dialogue.text: Hey! Are you watching? Am I on TV?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_BushedHikingFromMauville
dialogue.text: Whew… I'm just bushed… I hiked over from MAUVILLE CITY. But, boy, this city's huge. If I'd known this, I would've ridden my BIKE here.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_CaptainsACelebrity
dialogue.text: A TV interview! Here! The CAPTAIN's a celebrity!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_EveryoneCallsHimCaptStern
dialogue.text: STERN, the fellow who built the MUSEUM, also happens to be the leader of an undersea exploration team. So, everyone calls him CAPT. STERN.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SternSaysDiscoveredSomething
dialogue.text: CAPT. STERN says they discovered something at the bottom of the sea. I wonder what it is? What could it be?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_GoingToCompeteInBattleTent
dialogue.text: Wroooar! I'm going to compete in the BATTLE TENT, too! But before that, I need to catch some POKéMON!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_VisitedMuseumOften
dialogue.text: When I was a child, I visited the MUSEUM often. I used to dream about the mysteries of the sea after seeing the exhibits.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_WhatsLongLineOverThere
dialogue.text: What is that over there? That long line…

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_QuitPushing
dialogue.text: Hey, there! Quit pushing! This is the line, can't you see?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_CaptainComeBackWithBigFish
dialogue.text: What's going on here? Did the good CAPTAIN come back with a big fish from the ocean floor?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SeaweedFullOfLife
dialogue.text: Ooh, look at this! The seaweed you can get around these parts is fresh and full of life. Why, it looks like it can even rear up and attack!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_CaptSternBeingInterviewed
dialogue.text: I was hoping that it was a famous star so I could get an autograph. But who's that being interviewed? Isn't that CAPT. STERN?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_HowTownIsBornAndGrows
dialogue.text: Where the water is clean, the fruits of bountiful harvest gather. And where people gather, a market soon starts. That is how a town is born and grows.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_InterviewerSoCool
dialogue.text: That lady interviewer is so cool and pretty. When I grow up, I'm going to be an international journalist!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_BuyBricksSoDecorWontGetDirty
dialogue.text: If you put DOLLS or CUSHIONS on the floor, they'll get dirty. I'm going to buy some BRICKS so my DOLLS and CUSHIONS won't get dirty when I leave them out.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SlateportWonderfulPlace
dialogue.text: Shopping where you can breathe the scent of the ocean… SLATEPORT is such a wonderful place!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_BigSmileForCamera
dialogue.text: TY: Okay, CAPT. STERN, a big smile for the camera!

0:1:9.notes: Also a scripted movement actor in the CaptStern cutscene; no dialogue of its own there.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_MostInvaluableExperience
dialogue.text: GABBY: I see, I see. You've had a most invaluable experience…

dialogue.condition: one-shot cutscene; ends warping player to MAP_SLATEPORT_CITY_HARBOR, VAR_SLATEPORT_CITY_STATE=2
dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SternMoveAheadWithExploration
dialogue.text: CAPT. STERN: Yes, indeed. We intend to move ahead with our exploration.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_GabbyWonderfulThanksForInterview
dialogue.text: GABBY: That's wonderful, CAPT. STERN! Thank you for taking the time from your busy schedule to talk to us. We hope we can interview you again with news of more discoveries!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SternWhewFirstInterview
dialogue.text: CAPT. STERN: Whew… That was my first time to be filmed for TV. That was nerve-wracking.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_OhPlayerWeMadeDiscovery
dialogue.text: Oh! {PLAYER}{KUN}! You're looking great! We made a huge discovery on our last seafloor exploration. We found an underwater cavern on ROUTE 128. We think it's the habitat of a POKéMON that's said to have been long extinct.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_AquaWillAssumeControlOfSubmarine
dialogue.text: Fufufu… CAPT. STERN, I presume. We of TEAM AQUA will assume control of your submarine! Your objections are meaningless! We expect your total cooperation! Fufufu… Just watch and learn what TEAM AQUA has planned!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SternWhatWasAllThat
dialogue.text: CAPT. STERN: What was that all about? It sounded like someone using a megaphone… Where did it come from?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_FromHarborTryingToTakeSub
dialogue.text: It's from the HARBOR! The submarine! They're trying to take it!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_PleaseComeWithMe
dialogue.text: {PLAYER}{KUN}! Please, come with me!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SeaIsSoWet
dialogue.text: The sea is just so vast… Could the sea have been made by the tears shed by POKéMON?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SinkOldBoats
dialogue.text: Do you know what they do with old ships that become too creaky to sail? They sink them in the sea so they become habitats for POKéMON.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_BuyTooMuch
dialogue.text: Whenever I visit here, I get carried away and buy too much.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_BattleTentBuiltRecently
dialogue.text: Recently, a BATTLE TENT was built in SLATEPORT. GYMS are fun, but the BATTLE TENT's awesome in its own way. You should go find tough POKéMON for the BATTLE TENT!

dialogue.condition: both branches identical text (source comment says unclear if meant to differ)
dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_GetNameRaterToHelpYou
dialogue.text: If you want to change your POKéMON's nickname, you'll have to get the NAME RATER to help you.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_CantChangeTradeMonName
dialogue.text: Any POKéMON you get in a trade, you can't change its nickname. The original TRAINER's love for that POKéMON is in the nickname.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_AquaHasPolicy
dialogue.text: TEAM AQUA has a policy of assembling and dispersing at the operation site.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_BossIsBrilliant
dialogue.text: Our BOSS is brilliant. What would he want to do with a MUSEUM now?

dialogue.label: gText_ComeBackWithSecretPower
dialogue.text: Do you know the TM SECRET POWER? Our group, we love the TM SECRET POWER. One of our members will give it to you. Come back and show me if you get it. We'll accept you as a member and sell you good stuff in secrecy.

dialogue.label: gText_HowMayIServeYou
dialogue.text: Welcome! How may I serve you?

dialogue.label: gText_PleaseComeAgain
dialogue.text: Please come again!

dialogue.label: gText_HowMayIServeYou
dialogue.text: Welcome! How may I serve you?

dialogue.label: gText_PleaseComeAgain
dialogue.text: Please come again!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_WonderIfLighthouseStartlesPokemon
dialogue.text: The light of the lighthouse reaches dozens of miles away. I wonder if it doesn't startle POKéMON in the sea.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_OhYourPokemon
dialogue.text: Oh? Your {STR_VAR_1}…

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_EffortRibbonLooksGoodOnIt
dialogue.text: Oh! Your {STR_VAR_1}, that EFFORT RIBBON looks good on it!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_GoForItLittleHarder
dialogue.text: You have to go for it a little harder. If you do, I'll give your POKéMON something nice.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_PleaseGiveItThisEffortRibbon
dialogue.text: Went for it stupendously! As its reward, please give it this EFFORT RIBBON.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_ReceivedEffortRibbon
dialogue.text: {PLAYER} received the EFFORT RIBBON.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_PutEffortRibbonOnMon
dialogue.text: {PLAYER} put the EFFORT RIBBON on {STR_VAR_1}.

0:1:23.notes: Awards EFFORT RIBBON via special GiveLeadMonEffortRibbon - a pokemon-data special, NOT a giveitem; no item id/qty exists.

dialogue.label: gText_HowMayIServeYou
dialogue.text: Welcome! How may I serve you?

dialogue.label: gText_PleaseComeAgain
dialogue.text: Please come again!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_EnergyGuruSellWhatYouNeed
dialogue.text: I'm the ENERGY GURU! I'll go for it and sell you what you need!

dialogue.label: gText_PleaseComeAgain
dialogue.text: Please come again!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_WhatsNewSchemeIWonder
dialogue.text: What's the new scheme, I wonder? Our BOSS is scary when he's mad, so I'd better not screw things up…

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_ShouldTakeItAll
dialogue.text: If there's something we need in the MUSEUM, we should take it all!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_DontButtIn
dialogue.text: Hey, you there! Don't butt in!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_RemindsMeOfLongLineForGames
dialogue.text: A long line, huh? It reminds me of the times I lined up to buy smash-hit games…

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_WhyAreWeLiningUp
dialogue.text: Why are we even lining up and paying? We should just march in!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_WhatDoYouWant
dialogue.text: What? What do you want?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_IllReadSignForYou
dialogue.text: You want to read this sign? I'll read it for you!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_SaysSomethingLikeSeaIsEndless
dialogue.text: Let's see… Um… I think it says something like “the life in the sea is endless.” Yup, I'm pretty sure that's what it says.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_ShouldveBroughtMyGameBoy
dialogue.text: Grumble… I should've brought my Game Boy Advance so I wouldn't get bored in line… Grumble…

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_HotSpringsAfterOperation
dialogue.text: When this operation's over, I'll take you to a hot spring spa! That's what our leader said. I can't wait!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_ExplainBerries
dialogue.text: If a wild POKéMON gets hurt, it heals itself by chewing on BERRIES. Did you know that? Somebody saw that and got the idea of making medicine from BERRIES. Did you know that? To turn BERRIES into medicine, they must be crushed into powder. Did you know that? You seem to have an interest in BERRIES! I've got something good for someone like you.

dialogue.condition: first visit seq; then giveitem POWDER_JAR + setflag
dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_ExplainBerryPowder
dialogue.text: I recently had machines installed at POKéMON CENTERS for crushing BERRIES. The BERRY CRUSH machines are at the DIRECT CORNER upstairs. Did you know? Could you make BERRY POWDER for me using those machines? I can make you all sorts of medicine if you bring me lots of BERRY POWDER.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_BroughtMeSomeBerryPowder
dialogue.text: Have you brought me some BERRY POWDER?

0:1:34.notes: Exchange menu also gives 1 of 11 items via dynamic VAR_0x8008 paid with berry powder (ENERGY_POWDER 50 ... PP_UP 3000) - dynamic, not a fixed giveitem.

dialogue.condition: UNPARSED as direct interact (script 0x0); via OnFrame scene when VAR_SLATEPORT_OUTSIDE_MUSEUM_STATE==1
dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_YouDroveTeamAquaAway
dialogue.text: SCOTT: Huh? I'm sure I met you somewhere before. Have I introduced myself to you? If not, my name's SCOTT. I just saw TEAM AQUA run away from here like they were stung. Let me guess--you drove them away?

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_MaybeThisTrainer
dialogue.text: SCOTT: Hmm… Maybe, just maybe, this TRAINER…

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_LetsRegisterEachOther
dialogue.text: SCOTT: All right! I think you're going to become a good friend. So, let's register each other in our POKéNAVS. … … … … … …

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_RegisteredScott
dialogue.text: Registered this SCOTT person in the POKéNAV.

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_KeepEyeOnTrainersBeSeeingYou
dialogue.text: SCOTT: What I'd like to do is tag along with you, but I do want to keep an eye on the talents of other people, too. So, I'll be off to roam other towns a bit more. Be seeing you, {PLAYER}{KUN}!

dialogue.label: SlateportCity_Text_TakingBattleTentChallenge
dialogue.text: SCOTT: Oh, hey! If it isn't {PLAYER}{KUN}! {PLAYER}{KUN}, let me guess--you're going to take the BATTLE TENT challenge? Yeah! That's a good idea! That's a really great idea! After all, a tough TRAINER is the perfect fit for the BATTLE TENT! Give it your best effort!

0:1:35.notes: UNPARSED as a per-object interact script: object's script field is literal 0x0. Dialogue comes from map-level OnFrame trigger + coord_event, both referencing LOCALID_SLATEPORT_SCOTT.

dialogue.text: Hello, and welcome to the POKéMON CENTER. We restore your tired POKéMON to full health. Would you like to rest your POKéMON?
dialogue.label: gText_WouldYouLikeToRestYourPkmn

dialogue.text: We hope to see you again!
dialogue.label: gText_WeHopeToSeeYouAgain

dialogue.text: Okay, I'll take your POKéMON for a few seconds.
dialogue.label: gText_IllTakeYourPkmn

dialogue.text: Thank you for waiting. We've restored your POKéMON to full health.
dialogue.label: gText_RestoredPkmnToFullHealth

dialogue.condition: FLAG_POKERUS_EXPLAINED not set AND IsPokerusInParty == TRUE
dialogue.text: Your POKéMON may be infected with POKéRUS. Little is known about the POKéRUS except that they are microscopic life-forms that attach to POKéMON. While infected, POKéMON are said to grow exceptionally well.
dialogue.label: gText_PokerusExplanation

dialogue.text: Th-that card… Could it be… The GOLD CARD?! Oh, the gold color is brilliant! The four stars seem to sparkle! I've seen several TRAINERS with a SILVER CARD before, but, {PLAYER}, you're the first TRAINER I've ever seen with a GOLD CARD! Okay, {PLAYER}, please allow me the honor of resting your POKéMON!
dialogue.label: gText_NoticesGoldCard

dialogue.text: I'm delighted to see you, {PLAYER}! You want the usual, am I right?
dialogue.label: gText_YouWantTheUsual

dialogue.text: Thank you for waiting.
dialogue.label: gText_ThankYouForWaiting

dialogue.text: We hope to see you again!
dialogue.label: gText_WeHopeToSeeYouAgain2

dialogue.condition: union room: VAR_0x8008 == 1 AND FLAG_NURSE_UNION_ROOM_REMINDER not set
dialogue.text: It appears as if {STR_VAR_1} is playing right now. Go for it!
dialogue.label: CableClub_Text_PlayerIsWaiting

dialogue.text: Want a tip for battling? I'd say it's raising different kinds of POKéMON in a balanced manner. It's no good to make just one POKéMON strong. If it has a type disadvantage, it might not stand a chance.
dialogue.label: SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_RaiseDifferentTypesOfPokemon

dialogue.text: I trade POKéMON with my friends. If a traded POKéMON is holding an item, it makes me twice as happy!
dialogue.label: SlateportCity_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_TradedMonWithFriend
